name: Subprocessor Change Notice.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
CHG-001  Subprocessor Change Notice
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Subprocessor Change Notice
Vendor communication for a material update to the Northwind subprocessor list.
Document ID
CHG-001
Issued By
Northwind Cloud Systems LLC
Notice Date
2024-04-03
Effective Date
2024-05-05
Status
Customer review open
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Notice Summary
Northwind hereby notifies Meridian of an update to the approved subprocessor list for the managed retrieval service. The
change introduces additional EU-based support and observability services.
Changed Subprocessor Entry
Subprocessor
Service
Hosting Region
Data Access Profile
EuroLogix Support GmbH
24×7 operational support and incident
triage
Frankfurt,
Germany
Potential access to diagnostic logs
and account metadata; no content
access expected
Customer Action Window
●
Customer may raise a documented objection within fifteen (15) days of this notice if the change creates a material
data-protection concern.
●
Northwind will provide supplemental information on technical safeguards and personnel-access controls upon written
request.
●
This notice does not itself amend Appendix C or any transfer mechanism and should be read alongside the DPA and
current subprocessor list.
